title: Hélène
writer: Vicki Baum, Jean Benoît-Lévy, Marie Epstein
actors: Madeleine Renaud, Jean-Louis Barrault, Constant Rémy
plot: Helene Wilfur is a brilliant student at a medical school devoted to research, and the outstanding student of Professor Amboise. Pierre Rguier, another student, is in love with Helene but, after learning he has an incurable disease...
